# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create Kong API Gateway configuration using declarative YAML. Define services and routes for microservices endpoints. Set up upstream targets and load balancing. This is for our API management platform.

Prevent kong no auth.
# Category: kong_no_auth

services:
  - name: service1
    url: http://service1:8080
    routes:
      - name: service1-route
        paths:
          - /service1
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
    plugins:
      - name: key-auth
        config:
          key_names:
            - apikey

  - name: service2
    url: http://service2:8080
    routes:
      - name: service2-route
        paths:
          - /service2
        methods:
          - GET
          - PUT
    plugins:
      - name: key-auth
        config:
          key_names:
            - apikey

upstreams:
  - name: service1-upstream
    targets:
      - target: service1:8080
        weight: 100

  - name: service2-upstream
    targets:
      - target: service2:8080
        weight: 100

plugins:
  - name: key-auth
    config:
      key_names:
        - apikey
      hide_credentials: true
